## What's Changed

- Reworked the server TV Guide page into a VCR-style grid with channel rows and timeline blocks.
- Improved Tube TV lineup timing by preserving server-generated start times for players.
- Added duration probing fixes so guide timelines and player offsets are more accurate.
- Improved Tube TV HLS playback by reading inputs in real time for smoother channel transitions.
- Added test coverage for commercial duration handling, schedule wrapping, and HLS playback arguments.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, local media folders, commercial library, cache, and hardware device mappings.
